final_verdict.one_liner: A well-established, accessible season opener featuring professional-level climbs in a scenic hilly region with strong value and community atmosphere.

videos.title: People Getting PRANKED on Japanese Game Shows! LOLLL
videos.description:
In this hilarious compilation of Japanese pranks we see Eiji Kotoge falling once and again in different crazy hidden camera pranks. Doors with fake bottoms and surprise on the other side, chairs with never ending fallings, cardboard tables and giant balls chasing people, what could go wrong???

Have a look at this video with the funniest moments and get ready to have the greatest fun... 

See more at www.brilliantnews.com

videos.title: Volta Limburg Classic
videos.description: Team Kaputt in de Volta Limburg Classic

videos.title: Hel van het Mergelland 1995
videos.description: Na mijn debacle in de Ronde van Limburg zondag jl. was het leuk om mezelf en een hoop oud renners en profs terug te zien in de kopgroep van de Hel van het Mergelland. We praten over 1995 toen aluminium frames en lompe helmen cool waren. Ik had zoals zo vaak weer eens te weinig gedronken en moest lossen na een extreme krampaanval in beide benen op de klim van Noorbeek, notabene de laatste klim van de dag. Kreeg het daarna ook nog aan de stok met mijn ploegleider over mijn grote fluoriserende Brico bril (toen heel cool omdat Mario Chipolini 'm droeg). Team Europolis was gesponsord door een lullig brillenmerk maar ik had duidelijk een andere smaak.

videos.title: Triple H entrance featuring Motörhead: WrestleMania 21, April 3, 2005
videos.description:
Triple H entrance featuring Motörhead: WrestleMania 21, April 3, 2005
World Heavyweight Champion Triple H makes his special entrance (with Motörhead playing "The Game" live) to defend his World Heavyweight Championship against the 2005 Royal Rumble match winner Batista at WrestleMania 21.
·
Sorry for cutting a little bit the image, but if I did not, the video was blocked.
·
📆 Sunday, April 3, 2005.
📺 WWE WrestleMania 21.
📍 Staples Center (Los Angeles, CA).
🤼‍♂️ Triple H vs. Batista (World Heavyweight Championship match).
🎤 Motörhead.
🎵 "The Game" by Motörhead.
📹 Source: WWE Network.
·
© WWE & WWE Network, 2005.
·
#WWE #WrestleMania21 #TripleH
tags: Triple H entrance featuring Motörhead: WrestleMania 21

rider_intel.search_text: No relevant race content was found in the provided transcripts for the NXT Classic gravel race in Eijsden, Limburg, Netherlands. The transcripts contain content about pranks and motorcycle reviews, but do not include any information about the 93-mile gravel race, its terrain, course conditions, elevation challenges, or rider experiences that would be useful for race preparation or intelligence gathering.
